rationale: Observation refers to Bx12 SBS used as an example of SBS features and results. The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id (route_bx12-plus), which IS the canonical Bx12 SBS record. Per rule: never link to own base_record_id; the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new.

Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the closest match — same entity_name ('New York City Department of Transportation'), same entity_type ('agency'). The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no different existing record is a better match.
